# XAUUSD Robot

> Free AI-powered XAUUSD (gold) trading robot / Expert Advisor (EA) for MetaTrader 4 and MetaTrader 5. The algo is provided free of charge when you open a trading account through a partner broker affiliate link. No subscriptions, no hidden fees. Educational information only — not financial advice.

## About
- Site: https://xauusdrobot.com/
- Product: BBFxAi XAUUSD Expert Advisor (automated gold trading algorithm for MT4/MT5)
- Model: Free EA via broker affiliate signup; no direct cost to the user
- Verified results: MyFXBook-verified live track record
- Contact: Telegram @BBFx_Ai

## Important Notes
- Trading gold (XAUUSD) and CFDs involves substantial risk of loss and is not suitable for every investor.
- Past performance and backtested results do not guarantee future results.
- This site earns affiliate commissions from broker referrals at no extra cost to the user.
